EXPLANATION: The paper "Agentic Reasoning for Large Language Models: A Survey" exists and is available on arXiv (arXiv:2601.12538), having been published in January 2026. Multiple independent sources and the primary author's GitHub page confirm the paper's title and authorship.

LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.12538
FOUND_TITLE: Agentic Reasoning for Large Language Models: A Survey
FOUND_AUTHORS: Tianxin Wei, Ting-Wei Li, Zhining Liu, Xuying Ning, Ze Yang, Jiaru Zou, Zhichen Zeng, Ruizhong Qiu, Xiao Lin, Dongqi Fu, Zihao Li, Mengting Ai, Duo Zhou, Wenxuan Bao, Yunzhe Li, Gaotang Li, Cheng Qian, Yu Wang, Xiangru Tang, Yin Xiao, Liri Fang, Hui Liu, Xianfeng Tang, Yuji Zhang, Chi Wang, Jiaxuan You, Heng Ji, Hanghang Tong, Jingrui He

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
